Body Planes #1 frontal #2 transverse #3 sagittal Directional Terms #4 anterior #7 inferior #10 proximal #13 superficial #5 posterior #8 lateral #11 distal #14 parietal #6 superior #9 medial #12 deep #15 visceral Abdominal Regions #16 right hypochondriac region #19 right lumbar region #22 right iliac region #17 epigastric region #20 umbilical region #23 hypogastric region #18 left hypochondriac region #21 left lumbar region #24 left iliac region STATIONS THREE AND FOUR: REGIONS OF THE BODY Label the models of this station with the number that corresponds to the appropriate structure of t
